title: Prosody × Semantics integration in irony & sarcasm — fMRI encoding
description: Voxel-wise ridge encoding of prosodic (openSMILE eGeMAPSv02) and semantic (CamemBERTa v2) features during irony and sarcasm comprehension. Analysis code for the accompanying paper: embeddings, encoding, block-permutation nulls and cluster-level FDR.
